---
title: "jacobian_displacement"
generated: true
description: "Per-point Jacobian of the deformation œÜ = id + u."
---

[‚Äπ back to `nitrix.geometry.grid`](../nitrix-geometry-grid.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:jacobian_displacement -->
```python
jacobian_displacement(u: Float[Array, '... *spatial d'], *, boundary_mode: Literal['nearest', 'wrap', 'mirror'] = 'nearest', spacing: Union[float, Sequence[float]] = 1.0) -> Float[Array, '... *spatial d d']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:jacobian_displacement -->
Per-point Jacobian of the deformation œÜ = id + u.

For a channel-last displacement field `u` with `d` spatial
axes, returns $J[..., i, j] = Œ¥_{i,j} + \partial  u_i / \partial  x_j$,
computed via central differences along each spatial axis.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:jacobian_displacement -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `u` | `Float` | `...` √ó `*spatial` √ó `d` | ‚Äî | Displacement field, channel-last, `(*leading, *spatial, d)` with `len(spatial) == d`. |
| `boundary_mode` | `Literal['nearest', 'wrap', 'mirror']` | ‚Äî | `'nearest'` | Boundary handling for the central difference. `"nearest"` (default) clamps to the edge cell -- this is what voxelmorph uses for QA on learned warps. `"wrap"` is periodic. `"mirror"` is non-repeating mirror. |
| `spacing` | `Union[float, Sequence[float]]` | ‚Äî | `1.0` | Voxel spacing along each spatial axis. `float` -> isotropic; sequence -> per-axis (length `d`). For non-isotropic fMRI / MRI grids the spacing should be in the same physical units as `u`; the central-difference denominator is `2 * spacing[axis]`. |

**Returns** `Float` ‚Äî shape `...` √ó `*spatial` √ó `d` √ó `d`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen perf:jacobian_displacement -->
:::: {.callout-note title="Benchmarks ‚Äî nitrix-perf-bench" collapse="true"}
GPU steady-state **94.8 ¬µs** (median, L4); up to **39.58√ó faster** than `numpy.jacobian`.  [full report](https://github.com/hypercoil/nitrix-perf-bench/blob/main/reports/PERF_JACOBIAN_DISPLACEMENT.md)

::: {.table-responsive}
| case | platform | param | baseline | status | steady (min/med) | compile | mem | fidelity | ratio |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| jacobian_displacement | jax-cpu | d=32 | `cupy.jacobian_displacement` | skipped | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| jacobian_displacement | jax-cpu | d=32 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 125.4 ¬µs / 134.8 ¬µs | 409.67 ms | 787 MB (rss) | ‚úì 5.5e-05√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| jacobian_displacement | jax-cpu | d=32 | `numpy.jacobian` | ok | 598.0 ¬µs / 665.2 ¬µs | 886.9 ¬µs | 787 MB (rss) | ‚úì 5.5e-05√ótol | 4.77x vs nitrix-jax |
| jacobian_displacement | jax-cuda12 | d=32 | `cupy.jacobian_displacement` | ok | 714.5 ¬µs / 732.3 ¬µs | 5.681 s | 0.39 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 5.5e-05√ótol | 7.82x vs nitrix-jax |
| jacobian_displacement | jax-cuda12 | d=32 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 91.4 ¬µs / 94.8 ¬µs | 525.23 ms | 3.28 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 5.5e-05√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| jacobian_displacement | jax-cuda12 | d=32 | `numpy.jacobian` | ok | 595.1 ¬µs / 608.0 ¬µs | 2.25 ms | 0.39 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 5.5e-05√ótol | 6.51x vs nitrix-jax |
| jacobian_displacement | jax-cpu | d=48 | `cupy.jacobian_displacement` | skipped | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| jacobian_displacement | jax-cpu | d=48 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 275.2 ¬µs / 277.9 ¬µs | 304.99 ms | 787 MB (rss) | ‚úì 5.5e-05√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| jacobian_displacement | jax-cpu | d=48 | `numpy.jacobian` | ok | 2.05 ms / 2.32 ms | 8.75 ms | 787 MB (rss) | ‚úì 5.5e-05√ótol | 7.47x vs nitrix-jax |
| jacobian_displacement | jax-cuda12 | d=48 | `cupy.jacobian_displacement` | ok | 678.0 ¬µs / 715.2 ¬µs | 1.923 s | 2.10 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 5.5e-05√ótol | 7.05x vs nitrix-jax |
| jacobian_displacement | jax-cuda12 | d=48 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 96.2 ¬µs / 104.1 ¬µs | 563.25 ms | 10.27 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 5.5e-05√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| jacobian_displacement | jax-cuda12 | d=48 | `numpy.jacobian` | ok | 1.83 ms / 1.90 ms | 7.13 ms | 2.10 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 5.5e-05√ótol | 19.06x vs nitrix-jax |
| jacobian_displacement | jax-cpu | d=64 | `cupy.jacobian_displacement` | skipped | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| jacobian_displacement | jax-cpu | d=64 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 756.2 ¬µs / 795.8 ¬µs | 175.74 ms | 787 MB (rss) | ‚úì 5.5e-05√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| jacobian_displacement | jax-cpu | d=64 | `numpy.jacobian` | ok | 5.15 ms / 5.48 ms | 16.60 ms | 787 MB (rss) | ‚úì 5.5e-05√ótol | 6.81x vs nitrix-jax |
| jacobian_displacement | jax-cuda12 | d=64 | `cupy.jacobian_displacement` | ok | 660.4 ¬µs / 685.8 ¬µs | 145.96 ms | 4.19 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 5.5e-05√ótol | 5.56x vs nitrix-jax |
| jacobian_displacement | jax-cuda12 | d=64 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 118.8 ¬µs / 138.7 ¬µs | 170.45 ms | 37.75 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 5.5e-05√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| jacobian_displacement | jax-cuda12 | d=64 | `numpy.jacobian` | ok | 4.70 ms / 5.03 ms | 15.47 ms | 4.19 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 5.5e-05√ótol | 39.58x vs nitrix-jax |
:::

*source: bench `361141e2` ¬∑ nitrix `5d1717e0`*
::::
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:jacobian_displacement -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
| `d` | spatial dimension (2 or 3) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
